---
title: "Peter's Solar Final Draft 5_2"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-02"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidycensus)
library(sf)
#library(tmap)
library(tmaptools)
library(DT)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(GGally)
library(DT)            # for visualizing data tables 
library(janitor)       # for automatically renaming variables
library(ggmap)         # for mapping points on maps
library(RColorBrewer)  # for color palettes
library(sf)            # for working with spatial data
library(leaflet)       # for highly customizable mapping
library(ggthemes)      # for more themes (including theme_map())
library(gplots)        # for col2hex() function
library(socviz)        # for the US county map
library(usmap)         # for plot_usmap
library(usdata)       # for abbr2state function
library(choroplethr)   # another option to make choropleths
library(choroplethrMaps)
library(maps)
library(rvest)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

```{r}
#imports Data
mass_solar_messy <- read_csv("~/Documents/GitHub/solar-incentive-adoption/Solar-Project/Solar-PV-Systems-in-MA-as-of-Jan-2025-readable.csv", 
    col_types = cols(`Date In Service` = col_date(format = "%m/%d/%Y"), 
        `Total Cost with Design Fees` = col_number(), 
        `Total Grant` = col_number()))

#cleans names
mass_solar_clean<-mass_solar_messy |>
  janitor::clean_names()|>
   mutate(year=year(date_in_service), month=month(date_in_service),weekday=wday(date_in_service), day=day(date_in_service))
```

```{r}
options(tigris_class = "sf")
ma_municipalities <- county_subdivisions(state = "MA", cb = TRUE)

ma_towns_geo <- ma_municipalities |>
  select(NAME, GEOID, geometry) |>
  rename(town_name = NAME) 

solar_count_city<-mass_solar_clean|>
  group_by(city)|>
  count(facility_type)|>
 arrange(desc(n))

solar_count_city_geo <- solar_count_city |>
  left_join(ma_towns_geo, by=c("city"="town_name")) |>
  drop_na() 

# This is the "magic" step that fixes your previous error
sunroof_spatial <- st_as_sf(sunroof_geo)

# 2. Generate the map
ggplot(data = solar_count_city_geo) +
  # We use 'n' for the fill (from your image)
  # 'lwd = 0.1' keeps the town border lines thin
  geom_sf(aes(fill = n, geometry = geometry), color = "white", lwd = 0.1) +
  
  # Styling the color scale
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    option = "plasma", 
    name = "Total Installs",
    labels = scales::label_comma(), # Adds commas to legend numbers (e.g., 1,000)
    na.value = "grey90"
  ) +
  
  # Labels and Clean Theme
  labs(
    title = "Residential Solar Installations by Town",
    subtitle = "Massachusetts Municipality Mapping",
    caption = "Source: Project Sunroof Data"
  ) +
  theme_void() + # Removes background grid/axes for a professional map look
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11)
  )

```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
total_installs_year<-mass_solar_clean|>
  count(year)|>
 mutate(num_instal=n)|>
  select(-"n")|>
  mutate(num_instal_total=cumsum(num_instal))

  
ggplot(total_installs_year, aes(x=year))+
  geom_col(aes(y=num_instal))+
  #geom_line(aes(y=num_instal_total))+
 # geom_col(aes(y=count), fill="green")+
  ggtitle("All Solar Registered Instalations in Massachusetts ")+
labs(y="Number of Instalations", x="Year")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
all_mass_year_type<-mass_solar_clean|>
  group_by(year, facility_type)|>
 summarise(mw=sum(capacity_dc_k_w)/1000)

all_mass_year_mw<-mass_solar_clean|>
  group_by(year)|>
summarise(total_mw=sum(capacity_dc_k_w/1000))|>
 mutate(mw_cum=(cumsum(total_mw)))

all_mass_year_type_mw<-all_mass_year_type|>
  full_join(all_mass_year_mw) 

ggplot(all_mass_year_type_mw, aes(x=year))+
  geom_col(aes(y=mw, fill=facility_type))+
  labs(title = "Renewable Energy Production Capacity (MW) Built Yearly in Massachusetts", y="Renewable Energy Production Capacity (MW)", x="Year", fill="Facility Type")+
  theme_clean()+
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 8), legend.title = element_text(size = 9))

ggplot(all_mass_year_type_mw, aes(x = year)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = mw_cum), linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 650, color = "SREC-1 (0-650 MW)"), 
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 2250, color = "SREC-2 (650-2250 MW)"), 
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(aes(yintercept = 5450, color = "SMART (2250-5450 MW)"), 
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Program Capacity Limits", values = c(
      "SREC-1 (0-650 MW)" = "purple",  
      "SREC-2 (650-2250 MW)" = "orange",
      "SMART (2250-5450 MW)" = "darkred")) +
  labs(title = "Massachusetts Total Renewable Energy Production Capacity (MW) Over Time", y = "Renewable Energy Production Capacity (MW)", x = "Year") + 
  theme_clean()
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
all_mass_year_type<-mass_solar_clean|>
  group_by(year)|>
  count(facility_type)|>
 arrange(desc(n))|>
 mutate(num_instal=n)|>
  select(-"n")

  
ggplot(all_mass_year_type, aes(x=year, y=num_instal, fill=facility_type))+
  geom_col()+
  labs(title= "Registered Solar Installations Over Time by Facility Type", y="Number of Instalations", x="Year", fill="Facility Type") +
  theme_clean()+
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 8), legend.title = element_text(size = 9))

ggplot(all_mass_year_type_mw, aes(x=year))+
  geom_col(aes(y=mw, fill=facility_type))+
  labs(title = "Renewable Energy Production Capacity (MWh) Built Yearly in Massachusetts", y="Renewable Energy Production Capacity (MWh)", x="Year", fill="Facility Type")+
  theme_clean()+
  theme(legend.text = element_text(size = 8), legend.title = element_text(size = 9))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

all_mass_year_com<-mass_solar_clean|>
  group_by(year,facility_type)|>
 summarise(mw=sum(capacity_dc_k_w)/1000)|>
 arrange(desc(mw))

ggplot(all_mass_year_com, aes(x=year, y=mw, fill=facility_type))+
  geom_col()+
 # geom_col(aes(y=count), fill="green")+
  ggtitle("Capacity of All Registered Solar Instalations in Massachusetts before 2025")+
labs(y="Total Capacity DC (MW)", x="Year", fill="Facility Type")


```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
all_mass_year_type<-mass_solar_clean|>
  filter(facility_type=="Community Solar")|>
  group_by(year)|>
 summarise(mw=sum(capacity_dc_k_w)/1000)|>
 arrange(desc(mw))

  
ggplot(all_mass_year_type, aes(x=year, y=mw))+
  geom_col()+
 # geom_col(aes(y=count), fill="green")+
  ggtitle("Capacity of registered Community Solar Instalations Over Time")+
labs(y="Total Capacity DC (MW)", x="Year", fill="Facility Type")
```

```{r}
all_mass_year_com1<-mass_solar_clean|>
   filter(facility_type=="Community Solar")|>
  group_by(year)|>
  count()|>
 arrange(desc(n))|>
 mutate(num_instal=n)|>
  select(-"n")

  
ggplot(all_mass_year_com1, aes(x=year, y=num_instal))+
  geom_col()+
 # geom_col(aes(y=count), fill="green")+
  ggtitle("Number of Registered Community Solar Instalations in Massachusets ")+
labs(y="Number of Instalations", x="Year", fill="Facility Type")
```

```{r}
mass_com_solar_ave<-mass_solar_clean|>
  filter(facility_type=="Community Solar")|>
  group_by(year)|>
  summarise(mean=mean(capacity_dc_k_w))

mass_res_solar_ave<-mass_solar_clean|>
  filter(facility_type=="Residential (3 or fewer dwelling units per building)")|>
  group_by(year)|>
  summarise(mean=mean(capacity_dc_k_w))

ggplot(mass_res_solar_ave, aes(x=year, y=mean))+
  geom_line()+
  ggtitle("Average Capacity of Registered Residential Solar Instalations in Massachusets ")+
 labs(y="Capacity of Instalations (MW)", x="Year", caption="Figure x" )

ggplot(mass_com_solar_ave, aes(x=year, y=mean))+
  geom_line()+
  ggtitle("Average Capacity of Registered Community Solar Instalations in Massachusets ")+
 labs(y="Capacity of Instalations (MW)", x="Year", caption="Figure x" )


```

```{r}
all_mass_year_mw<-mass_solar_clean|>
  group_by(year)|>
summarise(total_mw=sum(capacity_dc_k_w/1000))|>
 mutate(mw=(cumsum(total_mw)))
  
ggplot(all_mass_year_mw)+
  geom_line(aes(x=year, y=mw))+
 # geom_col(aes(y=count), fill="green")+
  ggtitle("Capacity of All Registered Solar Instalations in Massachusetts before 2025")+
labs(y="Total Capacity DC (MW)", x="Year")

```

```{r}
all_mass_year_type<-mass_solar_clean|>
  group_by(year, facility_type)|>
 summarise(mw=sum(capacity_dc_k_w)/1000)

all_mass_year_mw<-mass_solar_clean|>
  group_by(year)|>
summarise(total_mw=sum(capacity_dc_k_w/1000))|>
 mutate(mw_cum=(cumsum(total_mw)))


all_mass_year_type_mw<-all_mass_year_type|>
  full_join(all_mass_year_mw)

all_mass_year_type_mw

ggplot(all_mass_year_type_mw, aes(x=year))+
  geom_col(aes(y=mw, fill=facility_type))+
  geom_line(aes(y=mw_cum))+
  ggtitle("Capacity of All Registered Solar Instalations in Massachusetts before 2025")+
labs(y="Total Capacity DC (MW)", x="Year", fill="Facility Type")

ggplot(all_mass_year_type_mw, aes(x=year))+
  geom_col(aes(y=mw))+
  geom_line(aes(y=mw_cum))+
  ggtitle("Capacity of All Registered Solar Instalations in Massachusetts before 2025")+
labs(y="Total Capacity DC (MW)", x="Year")

```

```{r}

all_mass<- mass_solar_clean|>
  filter(facility_type=="Residential (3 or fewer dwelling units per building)") |>
  mutate(has_grant= total_grant>0)|>
  arrange(desc(total_grant))

all_mass_year<-all_mass|>
  count(year)|>
 mutate(num_instal=n)|>
  select(-"n")

grants_all<-all_mass|>
  group_by(year)|>
  summarise(count=sum(has_grant, na.rm=TRUE))
  
all_grant_year<-all_mass_year|>
  left_join(grants_all)
  
ggplot(all_grant_year, aes(x=year))+
  geom_col(aes(y=num_instal))+
  geom_col(aes(y=count), fill="green")+
  ggtitle("all single family solar instalations over time, with grant recieved ")+
labs(y="Number of Instalations", x="Year", fill="Number covered by grants")


all_mass_month<-all_mass|>
  mutate(year_month=sub("^([^-]*-[^-]*)-.*", "\\1", date_in_service))


all_mass_month1<-all_mass_month|>
  count(year_month)|>
 mutate(num_instal=n)|>
  select(-"n")

grants_all<-all_mass_month|>
  group_by(year_month)|>
  summarise(count=sum(has_grant, na.rm=TRUE))
  
all_grant_month1<-all_mass_month1|>
  left_join(grants_all) |>
  mutate(date = ym(year_month))
```

```{r, fig.width=10}
ggplot(all_grant_month1, aes(x = date)) +
  geom_col(aes(y = num_instal, fill = "Total Installations"), width=31) +
  geom_col(aes(y = count, fill = "Installations with Grants"), width=31) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = as.Date("2016-12-31"), 
                 color = "End of Commonwealth Solar, start of Mass Solar"), 
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = as.Date("2020-12-31"), 
                 color = "End of Mass Solar, start of EmPower"), 
             linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Total Installations" = "gray50",  "Installations with Grants" = "green")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("End of Commonwealth Solar, start of Mass Solar" = "blue","End of Mass Solar, start of EmPower" = "red")) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  labs(
    title = "All Single Family Solar Installations Over Time, with Grants Received", 
    subtitle = "Data aggregated by month", 
    y = "Number of Installations", 
    x = "Year", 
    fill = "Installation Type",
    color = "Program Transitions") +
  theme_clean() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1), legend.text = element_text(size = 8), legend.title = element_text(size = 9))
```

```{r}
all_mass<- mass_solar_clean|>
  filter(facility_type=="Residential (3 or fewer dwelling units per building)") |>
  mutate(has_grant= total_grant>0)|>
  arrange(desc(total_grant))

all_mass_month<-all_mass|>
  mutate(year_month=sub("^([^-]*-[^-]*)-.*", "\\1", date_in_service))

all_mass_month1<-all_mass_month|>
  count(year_month)|>
 mutate(num_instal=n)|>
  select(-"n")

all_mass_month2<-all_mass_month1|>
  mutate(Solar_insentive_type = case_when(
   between(year_month, "2010-01", "2014-04")~"SREC-1", 
   between(year_month, "2014-05", "2018-11")~"SREC-2",
   between(year_month, "2018-12", "2020-06")~"SMART 1.0",
   between(year_month, "2020-07", "2025-08")~"SMART 2.0",
   between(year_month, "2025-09", "2026-09")~"SMART 3.0")) |>
   mutate(date = ym(year_month))


ggplot(all_mass_month2, aes(x=date))+
  geom_col(aes(y=num_instal, fill= Solar_insentive_type), width=31)+
labs(title = "All Single Family Solar Installations Over Time, by Grant Program", y="Number of Instalations", subtitle = "Data aggregated by month", x="Year", fill = "Grant Program")+
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  theme_clean() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1), legend.text = element_text(size = 8), legend.title = element_text(size = 9))

```

```{r}
all_mass<- mass_solar_clean|>
  filter(facility_type=="Residential (3 or fewer dwelling units per building)") |>
  mutate(has_grant= total_grant>0)|>
  filter(year<="2008")|>
  arrange(desc(total_grant))

all_mass_month<-all_mass|>
  mutate(year_month=sub("^([^-]*-[^-]*)-.*", "\\1", date_in_service))


all_mass_month1<-all_mass_month|>
  count(year_month)|>
 mutate(num_instal=n)|>
  select(-"n")


all_mass_month2<-all_mass_month1|>
  mutate(Solar_insentive_type = case_when(
   between(year_month, "2010-01", "2014-04")~"SREC-1", 
   between(year_month, "2014-05", "2018-11")~"SREC-2",
    between(year_month, "2018-12", "2020-06")~"SMART 1.0",
      between(year_month, "2020-07", "2025-08")~"SMART 2.0",
    between(year_month, "2025-09", "2026-09")~"SMART 3.0"))
  
#library (plotly)
#all<-
  ggplot(all_mass_month2, aes(x=year_month))+
  geom_col(aes(y=num_instal, fill= Solar_insentive_type))+
  ggtitle("all single family solar instalations over time, with insentive period ")+
labs(y="Number of Instalations", x="month", fill="Number covered by grants")+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1))
#ggplotly(all)


```

```{r}
#from chat GPET

ma_srec <- tibble(
  year = 2010:2025,

  acp_srec1 = c(
    600, 550, 550, 550,
    523, 496, 472, 448,
    426, 404, 384, 365,
    347, 330, 330, 330
  ),

  acp_srec2 = c(
    NA, NA, NA, NA,
    375, 375, 350, 350,
    350, 333, 316, 300,
    285, 271, 257, 244
  ),

  auction_price = c(
    300, 300, 300, 300,
    300, 300, 300,
    285, 271, 257,
    244, 232, 221,
    210, 199, 189
  )
) |>
  mutate(
    auction_net = auction_price * 0.95,
    acp = ifelse(is.na(acp_srec2), acp_srec1, acp_srec2))


ggplot(ma_srec, aes(x = year)) +
  geom_ribbon(
    aes(ymin = auction_net, ymax = acp),fill = "orange",alpha = 0.4)+
  geom_line(aes(y = auction_net), color = "black", linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(aes(y = auction_net), color = "black") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(2010, 2025, 1)) +
  labs(title = "Mass SREC Market Price Range Over Time",
    subtitle = "Black = price set by state\nOrange band = range of penalty price",
    x = "Year",
    y = "SREC Price ($/MW)") +
  theme_clean()
```

```{r}

all_mass_month<-mass_solar_clean|>
   filter(year>="2008")|>
  mutate(year_month=sub("^([^-]*-[^-]*)-.*", "\\1", date_in_service))
 

all_mass_month1<-all_mass_month|>
  count(year_month, facility_type)|>
 mutate(num_instal=n)|>
  select(-"n")


all_mass_month1<-all_mass_month|>
  group_by(year_month,facility_type)|>
 summarise(mw=sum(capacity_dc_k_w)/1000)|>
 arrange(desc(mw))


all_mass_month2<-all_mass_month1|>
  mutate(Solar_insentive_type = case_when(
   between(year_month, "2010-01", "2014-04")~"SREC-1", 
   between(year_month, "2014-05", "2018-11")~"SREC-2",
    between(year_month, "2018-12", "2020-06")~"SMART 1.0",
      between(year_month, "2020-07", "2025-08")~"SMART 2.0",
    between(year_month, "2025-09", "2026-09")~"SMART 3.0"))
  
  
  
library (plotly)
all<-ggplot(all_mass_month2, aes(x=year_month))+
  geom_col(aes(y=mw, color= Solar_insentive_type, fill=facility_type ))+
  ggtitle("Capacity of solar instalations over time, with insentive period ")+
labs(y="Number of Instalations", x="month", fill="Number covered by grants")+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1))
ggplotly(all)

```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
